name: Telegram Mini App workspace scaffold and bootstrap
description: Create the `apps/tma` workspace package, Vite/React SPA bootstrap, Telegram bridge initialization layer, env/docs wiring, and repo-tooling integration needed for a real TMA runtime.

planned: Add `apps/tma` as a separate workspace app instead of extending `apps/web`.
Use the `@tma.js/*` package line for the first scaffold, with `@tma.js/sdk-react` as the primary React-facing dependency unless a concrete runtime blocker is proven.
Add Telegram bootstrap and capability-wrapper seams without landing auth or product CRUD in the scaffold slice.
Wire local HTTPS/tunnel and Telegram test-environment expectations into repo scripts/docs without changing worker product semantics.
verification: 2026-06-02 planning/docs follow-up created the active feat-079 ExecPlan and aligned the TMA reference docs with locked defaults for package line, session fallback, and worker-first bot runtime.

notes: This is the runtime starting point for the new client. No domain feature work should start before this scaffold exists.
